hero.headline: Something burning?
hero.description: A Smooth Operator responds within 30 minutes — and fixes your K8s, AWS or CI/CD problem.
hero.trust: No sales call. No long onboarding. Just tell us what burns.

step2.title: Operator responds
step2.desc: Within 30 min — human, not just bot.

bugfinder.title: Bugfinder
bugfinder.desc: “We don't know why it's not running.”

bugfixer.title: Bugfixer
bugfixer.desc: “We know it, but can't fix it.”

enabler.title: Enabler
enabler.desc: “Our team should be able to do this itself.”

healthcheck.title: Health Check
healthcheck.desc: “We don't know what we don't know.”

pricing.title: Load Credits
pricing.subtitle: No hidden costs. Credits secure the 30-min guarantee.

proof.title: Proof of Value
proof.desc: Every mission ends with a report. Met acceptance criteria = rising operator reputation.

qa.title: QA is King
qa.desc: Every fix is tested and documented. No half-measures.

requirements.title: Clear Requirements
requirements.desc: We force the customer to describe the problem precisely — before we start.

ai.title: AI-Augmented
ai.desc: Our operators use Claude Code & Agents — faster than classic freelancers.

chat.title: Website Chat
chat.desc: Right on this site — qualification in 2 minutes.

chatbot.title: Operator Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Anonymous Self-Help
chatbot.placeholder: Ask about pricing, services, data privacy...
chatbot.disclaimer: This bot is for anonymous questions. For individual cases with sensitive data we guide you to the protected area.

chatbotPage.headline: What can we help with?
chatbotPage.description: Ask anonymous questions about Smooth Operator. For individual cases with logs or credentials we guide you to the protected area.
chatbotPage.hint: Tip: Ask about prices, services, response times or data privacy.

onboarding.headline: Protected Area
onboarding.description: Before we can handle individual cases, we need a secure account and a short NDA.

step4.title: Data security
step4.desc: Confirmation: EU/ITR infrastructure, Bedrock-only, no export.

security.title: Data Security Promise
security.item2: Operator AI runs exclusively in our ITR data center (Bedrock).
security.item3: No sharing of customer data with third parties or third countries.
